calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-02-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Rossoff for Plaintiff Moses Guillory
Robert feyer for Defendant Sergio Guillory, who is present.

Settlement Conference Held. Parties entered into a signed agreement, which is not filed with the court. Settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 35 Belvedere Street, #1.

Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (218)
